trigger.description: Fires when a mechanic/auto shop contact is tagged for referral outreach

steps.description: Mark contact as in active mechanic referral sequence

steps.subject: Towing partner for your shop?
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

I'm Elliott with Axle Towing here in the Phoenix area. I wanted to reach out to {{contact.company_name}} because towing companies and auto shops are natural partners.

When your customers break down and need a tow to the shop, or when we tow a vehicle and the driver asks us where to take it for repairs -- it makes sense to have each other on speed dial.

I'd like to set up a simple mutual referral arrangement. We send our customers to {{contact.company_name}} for repairs, and you send your customers to us when they need a tow. No contracts, no fees. Just leave a few cards at each other's shops and make the referral when it fits.

Sound like something that could work?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 0 - Initial intro proposing mutual referral

steps.subject: Re: Towing partner for your shop?
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Following up on the towing partnership idea for {{contact.company_name}}. Wanted to share what we offer so you know what your customers would get:

- 30-minute average response time across the Phoenix metro
- Priority dispatch for partner shop referrals
- Both flatbed and wheel-lift trucks for any vehicle type
- 24/7 availability, including weekends and holidays
- Real-time text updates with ETA for your customer

When your customer calls needing a tow to {{contact.company_name}} in {{contact.city}}, we get them there fast and treat them right -- because they're your customer and that reflects on both of us.

Worth a quick chat to set this up?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 4 - Follow-up with service details and capabilities

steps.subject: Towing referral - standing offer
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Last note from me. If a customer ever calls {{contact.company_name}} needing a tow, just save our number -- 480-288-5526. We'll respond within 30 minutes and deliver them right to your shop.

And on our end, when someone asks us for a mechanic recommendation in {{contact.city}}, we'll send them your way.

No need to reply. The offer stands whenever it makes sense.

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 10 - Final low-pressure follow-up with standing offer
